MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-23-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF LETICIA MANULAT'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING WAS HEARD. GEORGE KAWAMOTO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS AND SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT JEWISH SENIOR LIVING GROUP. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE MOTION FOR PREFERENCE UNDER CCP 36(A)(2). HOWEVER, THE COURT SET A TRIAL DATE OF 05/18/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AND SET THE MATTER AS A JURY TRIAL AS JURY FEES WERE POSTED. (CMC OF 03/11/20 IS VACATED.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
